note: 05-30 full window (56 completed runs, 91.1%). 5 failures, 5 distinct classes. Prior critical cache-memory git anomaly resolved (did not recur).

anomalies.t: NEW: Linter Miner blew the 25M effective-token cap (25.13M/25M) -> CAPIError 429 -> all 4 --continue retries re-hit the cap -> exitCode=1 after 18m25s. Recurrence of the open token-budget class (#35661). Heavy linter-aggregation workflow now reliably exceeds the budget; needs scope reduction or a fail-fast on budget-429.

NEW & ironic: the [aw] Failure Investigator (6h) was the day's failure hotspot (100%, 1/1) — it timed out at the 60-min Claude CLI ceiling having spent 7.8M tokens / $7.15 (most expensive run today), AFTER concluding 'zero failures in the 6h window' early (~19:11). A no-failure window should converge in minutes; the full-hour burn + red fail is a cost/efficiency anomaly. Investigate early-exit logic.

NEW: PR Sous Chef (26690499578) failed pre-agent (0 turns) when the golangci-lint release tarball downloaded as a non-gzip body and tar exited 2 in the shared 'Install development dependencies' step. Transient infra flake exposing every workflow using that setup. Fix: validate/retry/checksum the download (Makefile:403). Durable tracking issue filed by the Failure Investigator.

REACTIVATED: add_comment target=* with no number failed the whole Contribution Check safe_outputs job (despite a successful create_issue). Absent in the 05-29 partial window; recurred on this full window. Plus create_issue temporary_id registered 0 temp ids, breaking add_labels chaining. Needs partial-failure tolerance + emit-time validation.

RESOLVED/NOT-RECURRING: yesterday's critical setup_cache_memory_git.sh 'fatal: not in a git directory' (which failed 2/2 cache-memory workflows) did NOT recur. Today both Chaos PR Bundle Fuzzer and Copilot PR Prompt Pattern Analysis succeeded. Defensive .git-validation fix still advisable but no active failures.

Smoke Claude (26690105542) failed on a 10-min Claude CLI timeout with 21x 'MCP error 0: client is closing: EOF' — run_attempt 2 on the now-MERGED firewall/gateway-bump PR #35973 (awf-squid Healthy, not #35780). PR-branch artifact; monitor whether the MCP-EOF cluster recurs on main after the gateway bump landed.
RESOLVED (2nd clean cycle): Changeset Generator on gpt-5.4 succeeded again. Fully closed.
Cost ticked back up to $5.24 (24.5M eff_tok) from $3.07, still below the $11.33 peak. 2nd-highest-cost workflow today. Watch for re-escalation.
Avenger absent two consecutive windows (05-29, 05-30); max-turns issue unverified. max-turns:50 recommendation remains open.

91.1% completion (51/56) on a full window. 12-day trend: 92.78 -> 88.89 -> 85.9 -> 75.6 -> 41.6 -> 81.1 -> 94.7 -> 85.7 -> 90.9 -> 81.0 -> 89.5 -> 91.1. Above the recent band; 5 failures all distinct one-offs, no systemic regression.

Top cost (claude-measured): Failure Investigator $7.15 (timed out), Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer $5.24, Daily Code Metrics $2.65, Smoke Claude $2.50 (timed out), Team Evolution $1.52. Top eff_tok: Linter Miner 25.1M (429-failed), Daily Safe Output Optimizer 24.5M, Failure Investigator 22.6M, Testify 21.3M, Cache Strategy 20.6M. Note: copilot/codex/gemini cost not reported (EstimatedCost=0), so total $24.55 is claude-biased.
Smoke Antigravity 10/12 blocked (83%) again — expected (antigravity-unleash.goog + Playwright Azure-CDN). No action.
